programme.title: Better Call Saul
programme.desc: Better Call Saul is the prequel to the award-winning series Breaking Bad, set six years before Saul Goodman (Bob Odenkirk) became Walter White's lawyer.

programme.title: Better Call Saul
programme.desc: In the second-season finale, Jimmy is forced to make a hard choice; and Mike takes matters into his own hands. Elsewhere, Hamlin relays shocking news while Chuck's condition continues to evolve.

programme.title: Better Call Saul
programme.desc: Jimmy helps Chuck regain his confidence, but Chuck makes clear to his brother that he hasn't forgiven Jimmy for his trespasses. After discovering an ominous note, Mike obsesses over the identity of a mysterious stranger who has been surveilling him. Kim and Jimmy clash over the boundaries of their shared workspace.

programme.title: Better Call Saul
programme.desc: Mike's (Jonathan Banks) pursuit of a new lead sheds light on the identity of the party who has taken a keen interest in him. He enlists Jimmy (Bob Odenkirk) in his covert investigation. A welcome addition transforms the offices of Wexler and McGill, but distressing news about Chuck (Michael McKean) jeopardizes Kim (Rhea Seehorn) and Jimmy's future.

programme.title: Better Call Saul
programme.desc: Jimmy decides to represent a new client, much to Kim's dismay. Meanwhile, Mike meets a formidable ally who presents an enticing offer.

programme.title: Better Call Saul
programme.desc: Jimmy finds comfort in a familiar place. Kim receives a life-changing proposal. Mike is pushed to the limit when what he holds dearest is threatened.

programme.title: Better Call Saul

programme.title: Lurker
programme.desc: A retail employee infiltrates the inner circle of an artist on the verge of stardom. As he gets closer to the budding music star, access and proximity become a matter of life and death.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: As subscribers surge, Cassie and Maddy clash when the truth comes to light; Rue realizes she is in far too deep when Alamo grows increasingly suspicious; Jules' relationship teeters on the edge, and Lexi discovers her sister is once again threatening to invade her territory.

programme.title: A Good Day to Die Hard
programme.desc: New York City cop John McClane (Bruce Willis) arrives in Moscow to track down his estranged son, Jack (Jai Courtney). McClane thinks his son is a criminal, so it comes as a shock when he learns that Jack is actually working undercover to protect Komarov (Sebastian Koch), a Russian government whistleblower. With their own lives on the line, McClane and Jack must overcome their differences in order to get Komarov to safety and thwart a potentially disastrous crime in the Chernobyl region.

programme.title: Rooster
programme.desc: After setting boundaries with her parents, Katie makes a decision about her marriage to Archie, who has his own talk with Sunny about the future; then, as he grapples with Katie's independence, Greg prepares to say goodbye to his semester.

programme.title: The Comeback
programme.desc: Urged by NuNet to make a public statement in defense of AI, Valerie contemplates her future with or without How's That?!

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: When Niall's estranged brother Ruben shows up at his wedding, it leads to an explosion of violence that catapults us back through their lives, from the eighties to the present day.

programme.title: Insidious: The Last Key
programme.desc: Brilliant parapsychologist Elise Rainier receives a disturbing phone call from a man who claims that his house is haunted. Even more disturbing is the address -- 413 Apple Tree Lane in Five Keys, N.M. -- the home where Elise grew up as a child. Accompanied by her two investigative partners, Rainier travels to Five Keys to confront and destroy her greatest fear -- the demon that she accidentally set free years earlier.

programme.title: Insidious: The Red Door
programme.desc: Josh Lambert heads east to drop his son, Dalton, off at school. However, Dalton's college dream soon becomes a living nightmare when the repressed demons of his past suddenly return to haunt them both.

programme.title: Dune
programme.desc: Paul Atreides, a brilliant and gifted young man born into a great destiny beyond his understanding, must travel to a dangerous planet in the universe to ensure the future of his family and his people. As malevolent forces explode into conflict over the planet's exclusive supply of a precious resource in existence, only those who can conquer their own fear will survive.

programme.title: Real Time With Bill Maher
programme.desc: Acerbic comic Bill Maher welcomes a panel of guests from diverse parts of the political spectrum for a lively discussion of current events, as well as offering his own perspective on contemporary issues.

programme.title: US Against the World: Four Years with the Men's National Soccer Team
programme.desc: Head coach Gregg Berhalter guides Christian Pulisic, Tyler Adams, and a collection of emerging young American soccer stars to the 2022 World Cup in Qatar.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: Nick Morton is a soldier of fortune who plunders ancient sites for timeless artifacts and sells them to the highest bidder. When Nick and his partner come under attack in the Middle East, the ensuing battle accidentally unearths Ahmanet, a betrayed Egyptian princess who was entombed under the desert for thousands of years. With her powers constantly evolving, Morton must now stop the resurrected monster as she embarks on a furious rampage through the streets of London.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: When Niall's estranged brother Ruben shows up at his wedding, it leads to an explosion of violence that catapults us back through their lives, from the eighties to the present day.

programme.title: Lurker
programme.desc: A retail employee infiltrates the inner circle of an artist on the verge of stardom. As he gets closer to the budding music star, access and proximity become a matter of life and death.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: A few years after high school, Rue's debts finally catch up with her; hoping to finance her dream wedding, Cassie tries to become internet famous, to the disapproval of Nate, who's juggling the demands of running Cal's business.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Rue travels to Mexico and confronts displacement; Jules navigates art school pressures and reflects generational struggles.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: A group of childhood friends wrestle with the virtue of faith, the possibility of redemption and the problem of evil.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Rue is offered a risky deal that draws her deeper into Alamo's world; Nate battles the city council, Maddy gives Cassie a mission that could skyrocket her new career; Lexi enlists Jules to create an original painting for LA Nights.

programme.title: Saltburn
programme.desc: A student is invited to an eccentric classmate's estate for an exciting summer.

programme.title: Christy
programme.desc: Christy Martin never imagined life beyond her small-town roots in West Virginia, until she discovered a knack for punching people. Fueled by grit, raw determination, and an unshakable desire to win, she charges into the world of boxing under the guidance of her trainer and manager-turned-husband, Jim. Flaunting a fiery persona in the ring, her toughest battles start to unfold outside it as she confronts family, identity, and a relationship that just might become life-or-death.

programme.title: Real Time With Bill Maher
programme.desc: Acerbic comic Bill Maher welcomes a panel of guests from diverse parts of the political spectrum for a lively discussion of current events, as well as offering his own perspective on contemporary issues.

programme.title: While We're Young
programme.desc: Middle-aged filmmaker Josh Srebnick (Ben Stiller) and his wife, Cornelia (Naomi Watts), are happily married, but stuck in a rut. So, when free-spirited couple Jamie (Adam Driver) and Darby (Amanda Seyfried) enter their lives, it's like a breath of fresh air -- especially for Josh, who pines for a youth he wishes he had. Soon, Josh and Cornelia are ditching friends their own age to hang out with the hipsters -- but whether the friendship can endure despite a 20-year age gap remains to be seen.

programme.title: Last Week Tonight With John Oliver
programme.desc: Comedian/writer John Oliver satirically examines events in Season 13.

programme.title: The Fate of the Furious
programme.desc: With Dom and Letty married, Brian and Mia retired and the rest of the crew exonerated, the globe-trotting team has found some semblance of a normal life. They soon face an unexpected challenge when a woman named Cipher forces Dom to betray them all. They must unite to bring home the man who made them a family and stop Cipher from unleashing chaos.

programme.title: US Against the World: Four Years with the Men's National Soccer Team

programme.title: US Against the World: Four Years with the Men's National Soccer Team

programme.title: Man of Steel
programme.desc: With the imminent destruction of Krypton, their home planet, Jor-El (Russell Crowe) and his wife seek to preserve their race by sending their infant son to Earth. The child's spacecraft lands at the farm of Jonathan (Kevin Costner) and Martha (Diane Lane) Kent, who name him Clark and raise him as their own son. Though his extraordinary abilities have led to the adult Clark (Henry Cavill) living on the fringe of society, he finds he must become a hero to save those he loves from a dire threat.

programme.title: Last Week Tonight With John Oliver
programme.desc: Comedian/writer John Oliver satirically examines events in Season 13.

programme.title: Paddington 2
programme.desc: Settled in with the Brown family, Paddington the bear is a popular member of the community who spreads joy and marmalade wherever he goes. One fine day, he spots a pop-up book in an antique shop -- the perfect present for his beloved aunt's 100th birthday. When a thief steals the prized book, Paddington embarks on an epic quest to unmask the culprit before Aunt Lucy's big celebration.

programme.title: Twister
programme.desc: During the approach of the most powerful storm in decades, university professor Dr. Jo Harding (Helen Hunt) and an underfunded team of students prepares the prototype for Dorothy, a ground-breaking tornado data-gathering device conceived by her estranged husband, Bill (Bill Paxton). When Harding tells Bill that Dorothy is ready for testing -- and that their privately funded rival Dr. Jonas Miller (Cary Elwes) has stolen the idea and built his own -- Bill rejoins the team for one last mission.

programme.title: Last Week Tonight With John Oliver
programme.desc: Comedian/writer John Oliver satirically examines events in Season 13.

programme.title: Color Theories by Julio Torres
programme.desc: In his second HBO comedy special, Peabody-winner Julio Torres presents a helpful guide to understanding the world through his playful interpretations of colors.

programme.title: A Most Violent Year
programme.desc: In 1981 New York, a fuel supplier (Oscar Isaac) tries to adhere to his own moral compass amid the rampant violence, corruption and decay that threaten his family and his business.

programme.title: Real Time With Bill Maher
programme.desc: Acerbic comic Bill Maher welcomes a panel of guests from diverse parts of the political spectrum for a lively discussion of current events, as well as offering his own perspective on contemporary issues.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: When Niall's estranged brother Ruben shows up at his wedding, it leads to an explosion of violence that catapults us back through their lives, from the eighties to the present day.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: A group of high school students navigates drugs, sex, identity, trauma, social media, love and friendship.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse
programme.desc: After reuniting with Gwen Stacy, Brooklyn's full-time, friendly neighborhood Spider-Man is catapulted across the Multiverse, where he encounters a team of Spider-People charged with protecting its very existence. However, when the heroes clash on how to handle a new threat, Miles finds himself pitted against the other Spiders. He must soon redefine what it means to be a hero so he can save the people he loves most.

programme.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
programme.desc: When an interdimensional rupture unravels reality, an unlikely hero must channel her newfound powers to fight bizarre and bewildering dangers from the multiverse.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: As subscribers surge, Cassie and Maddy clash when the truth comes to light; Rue realizes she is in far too deep when Alamo grows increasingly suspicious; Jules' relationship teeters on the edge, and Lexi discovers her sister is once again threatening to invade her territory.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: When Niall's estranged brother Ruben shows up at his wedding, it leads to an explosion of violence that catapults us back through their lives, from the eighties to the present day.

programme.title: US Against the World: Four Years with the Men's National Soccer Team
programme.desc: Head coach Gregg Berhalter guides Christian Pulisic, Tyler Adams, and a collection of emerging young American soccer stars to the 2022 World Cup in Qatar.

programme.title: The Pope's Exorcist
programme.desc: Father Gabriele Amorth, chief exorcist of the Vatican, uncovers a centuries-old conspiracy while investigating a young boy's terrifying possession.

programme.title: The Spectacular Now
programme.desc: High school senior Sutter Keely is an effortless charmer and self-proclaimed life of the party who unexpectedly falls in love with the nice girl Aimee Fineky. While Aimee dreams of the future, Sutter lives in the now. And yet somehow, they're drawn together. What starts as an unlikely romance becomes a sharp-eyed, straight-up snapshot of the heady confusion and haunting passion of youth -- one that doesn't look for tidy truths.

programme.title: The Switch
programme.desc: Neurotic Wally Mars has one bright spot in his life: his friendship with Kassie. When Kassie announces her intention to become pregnant using a sperm donor, Wally thinks he will be the lucky guy, but Kassie has someone else in mind. While drunk at Kassie's insemination party, Wally substitutes his sperm for the donor's, then passes out, remembering nothing. Seven years later, Wally meets Kassie's son, who seems oddly familiar to him.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: When Niall's estranged brother Ruben shows up at his wedding, it leads to an explosion of violence that catapults us back through their lives, from the eighties to the present day.

programme.title: Joker
programme.desc: Forever alone in a crowd, failed comedian Arthur Fleck seeks connection as he walks the streets of Gotham City. Arthur wears two masks -- the one he paints for his day job as a clown, and the guise he projects in a futile attempt to feel like he's part of the world around him. Isolated, bullied and disregarded by society, Fleck begins a slow descent into madness as he transforms into the criminal mastermind known as the Joker.

programme.title: Joker: Folie à Deux
programme.desc: Struggling with his dual identity, failed comedian Arthur Fleck stumbles upon true love while incarcerated at Arkham State Hospital. Awaiting trial for the murder of five people, Fleck soon discovers the music that's always been inside him.

programme.title: Dust Bunny
programme.desc: Ten-year-old Aurora asks a hit man to kill the monster she believes ate her entire family. To protect her, he'll need to battle an onslaught of assassins while accepting the fact that some monsters are real.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: When Niall's estranged brother Ruben shows up at his wedding, it leads to an explosion of violence that catapults us back through their lives, from the eighties to the present day.

programme.title: The A List: 15 Stories From Asian and Pacific Diasporas
programme.desc: A tapestry of personal vignettes from across the Asian American, Native Hawaiian, and Pacific Islander (AANHPI) communities in America.

programme.title: "Wuthering Heights"
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes when Heathcliff falls in love with Catherine Earnshaw, a woman from a wealthy family in 18th-century England.

programme.title: Fackham Hall
programme.desc: Eric Noone begins a forbidden romance with Rose Davenport, the lady of the house at a posh English manor. When an unexpected murder occurs, Eric gets framed, leaving Rose and her family's future uncertain.

programme.title: The Greatest Showman
programme.desc: Growing up in the early 1800s, P.T. Barnum displays a natural talent for publicity and promotion, selling lottery tickets by age 12. After trying his hands at various jobs, P.T. turns to show business to indulge his limitless imagination, rising from nothing to create the Barnum & Bailey circus. Featuring catchy musical numbers, exotic performers and daring acrobatic feats, Barnum's mesmerizing spectacle soon takes the world by storm to become the greatest show on Earth.

programme.title: Atomic Blonde
programme.desc: Sensual and savage, Lorraine Broughton is the most elite spy in MI6, an agent who's willing to use all of her lethal skills to stay alive during an impossible mission. With the Berlin Wall about to fall, she travels into the heart of the city to retrieve a priceless dossier and take down a ruthless espionage ring. Once there, she teams up with an embedded station chief to navigate her way through the deadliest game of spies.

programme.title: Boys Go to Jupiter
programme.desc: Billy 5000, a teenage gig worker with a rise-and-grind mindset, aims to make $5,000. His quest is derailed by a gelatinous alien's appearance.

programme.title: Call Me by Your Name
programme.desc: It's the summer of 1983, and precocious 17-year-old Elio Perlman is spending the days with his family at their 17th-century villa in Lombardy, Italy. He soon meets Oliver, a handsome doctoral student who's working as an intern for Elio's father. Amid the sun-drenched splendor of their surroundings, Elio and Oliver discover the heady beauty of awakening desire over the course of a summer that will alter their lives forever.

programme.title: Battle of the Sexes
programme.desc: The 1973 tennis match between Billie Jean King and Bobby Riggs became the most watched televised sports event of all time. Trapped in the media glare, King and Riggs were on opposites sides of a binary argument, but off-court each was fighting more personal and complex battles. With her husband urging her to fight for equal pay, the private King was also struggling to come to terms with her own sexuality, while Riggs gambled his legacy and reputation in a bid to relive the glories of his past.

programme.title: Dune
programme.desc: Paul Atreides, a brilliant and gifted young man born into a great destiny beyond his understanding, must travel to a dangerous planet in the universe to ensure the future of his family and his people. As malevolent forces explode into conflict over the planet's exclusive supply of a precious resource in existence, only those who can conquer their own fear will survive.

programme.title: Dune: Part Two
programme.desc: Paul Atreides unites with Chani and the Fremen while seeking revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the universe, he must prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

programme.title: Beetlejuice Beetlejuice
programme.desc: Still haunted by Beetlejuice, Lydia's life gets turned upside down when her daughter discovers a portal to the afterlife. When someone says Beetlejuice's name three times, the mischievous demon returns to unleash his very own brand of mayhem.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: A group of high school students navigates drugs, sex, identity, trauma, social media, love and friendship.

programme.title: The A List: 15 Stories From Asian and Pacific Diasporas
programme.desc: A tapestry of personal vignettes from across the Asian American, Native Hawaiian, and Pacific Islander (AANHPI) communities in America.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: When Niall's estranged brother Ruben shows up at his wedding, it leads to an explosion of violence that catapults us back through their lives, from the eighties to the present day.

programme.title: Saltburn
programme.desc: A student is invited to an eccentric classmate's estate for an exciting summer.

programme.title: Lurker
programme.desc: A retail employee infiltrates the inner circle of an artist on the verge of stardom. As he gets closer to the budding music star, access and proximity become a matter of life and death.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: A group of high school students navigates drugs, sex, identity, trauma, social media, love and friendship.

programme.title: Twister
programme.desc: During the approach of the most powerful storm in decades, university professor Dr. Jo Harding (Helen Hunt) and an underfunded team of students prepares the prototype for Dorothy, a ground-breaking tornado data-gathering device conceived by her estranged husband, Bill (Bill Paxton). When Harding tells Bill that Dorothy is ready for testing -- and that their privately funded rival Dr. Jonas Miller (Cary Elwes) has stolen the idea and built his own -- Bill rejoins the team for one last mission.

programme.title: Friendship
programme.desc: A suburban dad falls hard for his new neighbor.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: A group of high school students navigates drugs, sex, identity, trauma, social media, love and friendship.

programme.title: Enemy
programme.desc: A mild-mannered college professor (Jake Gyllenhaal) discovers a look-alike actor and delves into the other man's private affairs.

programme.title: Babygirl
programme.desc: A high-powered CEO puts her career and family on the line when she begins a torrid affair with her much younger intern.
A time traveler risks his life to change the course of history and save the future of humanity.

programme.title: My Blind Brother
programme.desc: Bill has always lived in the shadow of his overachieving brother Robbie, an arrogant athlete and local celebrity who happens to be blind. After years of thanklessly helping Robbie achieve one goal after another, Bill finally catches a break when he finds a connection with the charming Rose, who is dealing with her own crisis. But when Rose starts dating Robbie, Bill must decide if he can finally put his own happiness over his brother's and compete for the ultimate prize.

programme.title: Flight Risk
programme.desc: A U.S. marshal boards a small plane to transfer a government witness to New York. As they cross the Alaskan wilderness, tensions start to rise as not everyone on the flight is who they appear to be.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: A group of high school students navigates drugs, sex, identity, trauma, social media, love and friendship.

programme.title: Logan
programme.desc: In the near future, a weary Logan (Hugh Jackman) cares for an ailing Professor X (Patrick Stewart) at a remote outpost on the Mexican border. His plan to hide from the outside world gets upended when he meets a young mutant (Dafne Keen) who is very much like him. Logan must now protect the girl and battle the dark forces that want to capture her.

programme.title: US Against the World: Four Years with the Men's National Soccer Team
programme.desc: Head coach Gregg Berhalter guides Christian Pulisic, Tyler Adams, and a collection of emerging young American soccer stars to the 2022 World Cup in Qatar.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: A group of high school students navigates drugs, sex, identity, trauma, social media, love and friendship.

programme.title: Crazy Rich Asians
programme.desc: Rachel Chu is happy to accompany her longtime boyfriend, Nick, to his best friend's wedding in Singapore. She's also surprised to learn that Nick's family is extremely wealthy, and he's considered one of the country's most eligible bachelors. Thrust into the spotlight, Rachel must now contend with jealous socialites, quirky relatives and something far, far worse -- Nick's disapproving mother.

programme.title: The A List: 15 Stories From Asian and Pacific Diasporas
programme.desc: A tapestry of personal vignettes from across the Asian American, Native Hawaiian, and Pacific Islander (AANHPI) communities in America.

programme.title: Greenland 2: Migration
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a comet strike that decimated most of the planet, the Garrity family must leave the safety of their Greenland bunker to traverse a shattered world in search of a new home.

programme.title: The Mummy: Tomb of the Dragon Emperor
programme.desc: Cursed by a devious sorceress, China's ruthless Dragon Emperor (Jet Li) and his vast army lie buried in clay for millennia. When young archaeologist Alex O'Connell is tricked into reviving the emperor, he and his famous parents (Brendan Fraser, Maria Bello) must find a way to send the ghoul back to the grave before he can awaken his vast army and take over the world.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: Nick Morton is a soldier of fortune who plunders ancient sites for timeless artifacts and sells them to the highest bidder. When Nick and his partner come under attack in the Middle East, the ensuing battle accidentally unearths Ahmanet, a betrayed Egyptian princess who was entombed under the desert for thousands of years. With her powers constantly evolving, Morton must now stop the resurrected monster as she embarks on a furious rampage through the streets of London.

programme.title: Crazy Rich Asians
programme.desc: Rachel Chu is happy to accompany her longtime boyfriend, Nick, to his best friend's wedding in Singapore. She's also surprised to learn that Nick's family is extremely wealthy, and he's considered one of the country's most eligible bachelors. Thrust into the spotlight, Rachel must now contend with jealous socialites, quirky relatives and something far, far worse -- Nick's disapproving mother.

programme.title: Hidden Figures
programme.desc: Three brilliant African American women at NASA, Katherine Johnson, Dorothy Vaughan and Mary Jackson, serve as the brains behind one of the greatest operations in history, the launch of astronaut John Glenn into orbit, a stunning achievement that restored the nation's confidence, turned around the Space Race and galvanized the world.

programme.title: Dr. Seuss' The Cat in the Hat
programme.desc: In this live-action film based on the favorite children's tale, the trouble-making Cat in the Hat (Mike Myers) arrives at the home of bored young Sally Walden (Dakota Fanning) and her brother, Conrad (Spencer Breslin), while their mother (Kelly Preston) is out. The family's pet fish (Sean Hayes) objects to the Cat's presence, but that doesn't stop the hat-wearing giant feline from trying to have fun, no matter how much destruction is left in his wake.

programme.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: Dog Days
programme.desc: It's summer, and Greg Heffley (Zachary Gordon) is looking forward to playing video games and spending time with his friends. However, Greg's dad (Steve Zahn) has other plans: He's decided that some father-son bonding time is in order. Desperate to prevent his dad from ruining summer vacation, Greg pretends he has a job at a ritzy country club. But Greg's plan backfires, leaving him in the middle of embarrassing mishaps and a camping trip gone wrong.

programme.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: The Long Haul
programme.desc: Young Greg Heffley is looking forward to a long summer of just hanging out, but his mother throws a monkey wrench into his plans when she forces the entire family to take a road trip for a relative's birthday celebration. His eyes soon light up after he realizes that the excursion is his ticket to a gaming convention to meet YouTube sensation Mac Digby. Greg's imagination then kicks into overdrive as he sneakily hatches a scheme to attend the expo and gain some much-deserved fame.

programme.title: Dear Ms.: A Revolution in Print
programme.desc: A deep dive into the storied and complex legacy of "Ms." magazine through the lens of some of its covers.

programme.title: Stevie Van Zandt: Disciple
programme.desc: Stevie Van Zandt, known as New Jersey ́s most famous consigliere to Bruce Springsteen and Tony Soprano, takes center stage in this feature documentary. Featuring a wealth of never before seen footage, the film traces Van Zandt ́s career as a producer, musician, songwriter, activist, actor, and more, from the clubs of Asbury Park, N.J. to arenas and stadiums, to the Bada Bing Club and the Underground Garage.

programme.title: The Brutalist
programme.desc: Escaping postwar Europe, a visionary architect arrives in America to rebuild his life. On his own in a strange new country, a wealthy industrialist recognizes his talent -- but power and legacy comes at a heavy cost.

programme.title: The Lighthouse
programme.desc: Two lighthouse keepers try to maintain their sanity while living on a remote and mysterious New England island in the 1890s.

programme.title: Greenland
programme.desc: John Garrity, his estranged wife and their young son embark on a perilous journey to find sanctuary as a planet-killing comet hurtles toward Earth. Amid terrifying accounts of cities getting leveled, the family experiences the best and worst in humanity. As the countdown to the global apocalypse approaches zero, their incredible trek culminates in a desperate, last-minute flight to a possible safe haven.

programme.title: Greenland 2: Migration
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a comet strike that decimated most of the planet, the Garrity family must leave the safety of their Greenland bunker to traverse a shattered world in search of a new home.

programme.title: Eddington
programme.desc: A standoff between a small-town sheriff and mayor sparks a powder keg as neighbor is pitted against neighbor in May 2020 in Eddington, N.M.

programme.title: Smoking Tigers
programme.desc: Lonely 16-year-old Korean American Hayoung tries to hide her problematic family and lower-income background from her new wealthy friends.

programme.title: Life of Pi
programme.desc: After deciding to sell their zoo in India and move to Canada, Santosh and Gita Patel board a freighter with their sons and a few remaining animals. Tragedy strikes when a terrible storm sinks the ship, leaving the Patels' teenage son, Pi, as the only human survivor. However, Pi is not alone; a fearsome Bengal tiger has also found refuge aboard the lifeboat. As days turn into weeks and weeks drag into months, Pi and the tiger must learn to trust each other if both are to survive.

programme.title: Spring Breakers
programme.desc: College students Candy (Vanessa Hudgens), Faith (Selena Gomez), Brit (Ashley Benson) and Cotty (Rachel Korine) are short of the cash they need for a spring-break trip, so they rob a diner and head down to Florida. However, the police soon break up the party and arrest them. The curvaceous quartet are unexpectedly bailed out by a drug dealer and aspiring rap artist named Alien (James Franco). Soon after, three of the four gal pals decide to join Alien in a life of crime.

programme.title: The Batman
programme.desc: Batman ventures into Gotham City's underworld when a sadistic killer leaves behind a trail of cryptic clues. As the scale of the perpetrator's plans become clear, he must bring justice to the abuse of power and corruption that plagues the metropolis.

programme.title: Black Adam
programme.desc: In ancient Kahndaq, Teth Adam was bestowed the almighty powers of the gods. After using these powers for vengeance, he was imprisoned, becoming Black Adam. Nearly 5,000 years have passed, and Black Adam has gone from man to myth to legend. Now free, his unique form of justice, born out of rage, is challenged by modern-day heroes who form the Justice Society: Hawkman, Dr. Fate, Atom Smasher and Cyclone.

programme.title: Alive Day Memories: Home From Iraq
programme.desc: Ten soldiers who suffered traumatic injuries during the Iraq war discuss their experiences with actor James Gandolfini.

programme.title: Escape From Kabul
programme.desc: Examining 18 days in August 2021, from the U.S. withdrawal of its troops from Afghanistan through the subsequent evacuation of tens of thousands of Afghan citizens from Kabul airport after the Taliban seized the city.

programme.title: Prime Minister
programme.desc: Chronicling Jacinda Ardern's unexpected journey as New Zealand's 40th Prime Minister, this documentary offers an unfiltered window into her years in power.

programme.title: Logan
programme.desc: In the near future, a weary Logan (Hugh Jackman) cares for an ailing Professor X (Patrick Stewart) at a remote outpost on the Mexican border. His plan to hide from the outside world gets upended when he meets a young mutant (Dafne Keen) who is very much like him. Logan must now protect the girl and battle the dark forces that want to capture her.

programme.title: The Shape of Water
programme.desc: Elisa is a mute, isolated woman who works as a cleaning lady in a hidden, high-security government laboratory in 1962 Baltimore. Her life changes forever when she discovers the lab's classified secret -- a mysterious, scaled creature from South America that lives in a water tank. As Elisa develops a unique bond with her new friend, she soon learns that its fate and very survival lies in the hands of a hostile government agent and a marine biologist.

programme.title: Warfare
programme.desc: The harrowing true story of a U.S. Navy SEAL platoon surveillance mission gone dangerously wrong.

programme.title: A Good Day to Die Hard
programme.desc: New York City cop John McClane (Bruce Willis) arrives in Moscow to track down his estranged son, Jack (Jai Courtney). McClane thinks his son is a criminal, so it comes as a shock when he learns that Jack is actually working undercover to protect Komarov (Sebastian Koch), a Russian government whistleblower. With their own lives on the line, McClane and Jack must overcome their differences in order to get Komarov to safety and thwart a potentially disastrous crime in the Chernobyl region.

programme.title: Flight Risk
programme.desc: A U.S. marshal boards a small plane to transfer a government witness to New York. As they cross the Alaskan wilderness, tensions start to rise as not everyone on the flight is who they appear to be.

programme.title: Meg 2: The Trench
programme.desc: Jonas Taylor leads a research team on an exploratory dive into the deepest depths of the ocean. Their voyage spirals into chaos when a malevolent mining operation threatens their mission and forces them into a high-stakes battle for survival. Pitted against colossal, prehistoric sharks and relentless environmental plunderers, they must outrun, outsmart and outswim their merciless predators.

programme.title: My Cousin Rachel
programme.desc: Philip is a young Englishman who finds his cousin Ambrose dead after traveling to Florence, Italy. He vows revenge against Ambrose's missing wife Rachel, blaming her for his untimely demise. When Philip meets Rachel for the first time, his mood suddenly changes as he finds himself falling for her seductive charm and beauty. As his obsession for her grows, Rachel now hatches a scheme to win back her late husband's estate from the unsuspecting Philip.

programme.title: Nine Lives
programme.desc: Tom Brand is a billionaire whose workaholic lifestyle takes him away from his loving wife Lara and adorable daughter Rebecca. Needing a present for Rebecca's 11th birthday, Brand buys a seemingly harmless cat from a mysterious pet store. Suddenly, a bizarre turn of events traps poor Tom inside the animal's body. The owner of the business tells him that he has one week to reconnect with his family, or live out the rest of his days as a cute and furry feline named Mr. Fuzzypants.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 2
programme.desc: Now known as the Dragon Warrior, Po protects the Valley of Peace alongside his friends and fellow kung fu masters, the Furious Five. However, a dangerous villain threatens Po's awesome new life with plans to use a secret weapon to wipe out the martial art and conquer China. In order to defeat the new enemy, Po finds he must recall his past and unlock secrets of his mysterious origins; only then will he find the strength to vanquish his foe.

programme.title: Ice Age: Continental Drift
programme.desc: Scrat's continuous pursuit of an infernal acorn has world-changing consequences for Manny (Ray Romano), Sid (John Leguizamo) and Diego (Denis Leary) when the continents split apart. The continental crack-up separates Manny and his friends from the rest of the herd, including Manny's mate, Ellie (Jennifer Lopez) and rebellious daughter Peaches (Keke Palmer). The pals are desperate to return home, but a pirate (Peter Dinklage) and his ragtag crew stand in their way.

programme.title: Born to Bowl
programme.desc: At the U.S. Open, the first major tournament of the year in Indianapolis, Kyle Troup, AKA "The Pro with the 'Fro," sets out to repeat as bowling's "Green Jacket" winner.

programme.title: Born to Bowl
programme.desc: Vying for a spot in the U.S. Open finals, Anthony "Simo" Simonsen and Australia's Jason "Belmo" Belmonte face off as tempers escalate and injuries flare.

programme.title: Born to Bowl
programme.desc: At the Pete Weber Classic in Springfield, Missouri, named after one of the sports greats, bowler extraordinaire EJ Tackett must fend off Belmo and Simo to reclaim the top prize.

programme.title: Born to Bowl
programme.desc: 200 bowlers from 18 different countries descend upon Reno, Nevada to compete in the month-long World Series of Bowling.

programme.title: Born to Bowl
programme.desc: As the top bowlers arrive at The Tournament of Champions in Akron, Ohio, the future of the PBA Tour hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Alien
programme.desc: In deep space, the crew of the commercial starship Nostromo is awakened from their cryo-sleep capsules halfway through their journey home to investigate a distress call from an alien vessel. The terror begins when the crew encounters a nest of eggs inside the alien ship. An organism from inside an egg leaps out and attaches itself to one of the crew, causing him to fall into a coma.

programme.title: Aliens
programme.desc: After floating in space for 57 years, Lt. Ripley's shuttle is found by a deep space salvage team. Upon arriving at LV-426, the marines find only one survivor, a nine-year-old girl named Newt. But even these battle-hardened marines with all the latest weaponry are no match for the hundreds of aliens that have invaded the colony.

programme.title: Alien 3

Once again, Ripley must face skepticism and the alien as it hunts down the prisoners and guards. Without weapons or modern technology of any kind, Ripley leads the men into battle against the terrifying creature.

programme.title: Alien Resurrection
programme.desc: Two hundred years have passed since Ellen Ripley died on Fiorina 161. Aboard the medical research vessel USM Auriga, a team of scientists clones Ripley from her extracted DNA and removes the alien Queen embryo which was growing inside her at the time of her death.

programme.title: AVP: Alien vs. Predator

Making matters worse, another extraterrestrial species, known as Predators, arrive to hunt the other aliens, with the humans caught in the middle of the conflict.

programme.title: G'wed
programme.desc: Comedy series providing an honest, uplifting and heart-warming portrayal of the lives of working-class teenagers from Liverpool while tackling issues with a refreshing humour. Ted is the envy of the school as he starts dating popular sixth-former Thomas - Ted finds Thomas's talk of their spiritual connection beguiling, and their electrifying romance is cemented when Thomas takes Ted to see the Gormley statues on Crosby Beach for the very first time. This is a side of Liverpool that Ted never knew existed and a way of looking at the world that captures his heart and imagination, but for all Thomas's talk of them being soulmates, Ted is left with a decision to make when it is revealed that his older lover is exploring ethical non-monogamy. Meanwhile, Mia-Louise is worried that Ziad might be gay as he doesn't want to have sex with her, Mo is still acting like a devout Muslim in the hope of getting closer with The Brimble, and Christopher and Aimee bond over their Romeo and Juliet scenes.

programme.title: Plebs
programme.desc: Sitcom set in ancient Rome. When the boys attend a free trial session at a swanky new bathhouse and attempt to outstay their welcome, Marcus courts a potential business contact he meets in the changing room while Jason starts dating a yoga instructor.

programme.title: Count Abdulla
programme.desc: Comedy series about twenty-something British-Pakistani Muslim doctor Abdulla Khan. Abdulla is desperate for some answers and unfaltering in his desire to find a cure to his vampirism when he agrees to go on a date with Kathy at her favourite haunt - once there, however, the out-of-place young Muslim can't shake the feeling that he is being watched by the coven and by Shafi, who turns up with his beautiful fiancee Nahima to intervene as Muslims don't do boyfriend-girlfriend dates! Elsewhere, Bushra and Shafi arrange for a marriage counsellor to see Abdulla to set him straight, but the man that turns up is not who they expect him to be... When the 'Halal double date' turns sour, Abdulla is forced to take protective action which sees the hitherto receptive Kathy return to her terrifying former self - now on the run, Abdulla drops down at Amrita's door but finds that her relationship status might be a little different to what he expected.

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection. [S]

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Project Bakeover
programme.desc: Canadian reality series following renowned pastry chef, master chocolatier and entrepreneur Steve Hodge as he works with beloved design guru Tiffany Pratt to reinvigorate North American bakeries on the brink of losing it all. This episode features the Wannamaker's family bakery, which is run by Melanie and her daughters but is nearing collapse with bills piling up and no business leadership - Steve will have to tackle their strained family dynamics if he is to help them find sweet success.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Home improvement programme where contractor Brian McCourt and designer Sarah Keenleyside help to expand living spaces by tapping into people's backyards. Lynna is a single mother with three teenage kids and the time has come for her to have the back garden of her dreams - Brian and Sarah deliver, and then some, with a hangout that is suitable for use nearly all year round, lush new landscaping, and a beautiful greenhouse.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex
programme.desc: The Vietnam trip may be over, but the fallout is only just beginning. Resentment still lingers among the group, and a shocking revelation stops Elma in her tracks. [S] S37 Ep6

programme.title: Britain's Got Talent
programme.desc: Britain's Got Talent goes live on Saturday nights for the Semi-Finals. In each week's show, a fresh variety of acts who impressed the judges during the auditions will put on exciting new performances as they compete for a place in the grand finale, getting one step closer to the life-changing prize of 250,000 pounds and a place on the bill of the Royal Variety Performance. Viewers at home hold the power to vote for their favourite acts of the night to send through to the ultimate stage of the competition, and the judges have their Golden Buzzer that can reward outstanding performers a ticket straight through to the live final.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: Graham Norton invites civil servant Becca, programme insights lead Kurt, and police analyst Soraya to spin the wheel and avoid bankrupts to win a possible 50,000 pounds.

programme.title: Celebrity Catchphrase
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts a celebrity special of the classic game show with Mark Charnock, Kerry Godliman, and Janet Street-Porter all trying to 'say what they see' as they guess well-known phrases for the chance to win a 50,000-pound jackpot for their chosen charity.

programme.title: The Croods
programme.desc: Animated family comedy. The Croods are an eccentric family of cavemen who survive the harsh terrain they occupy by living accordingly to a strict set of rules - when their home is destroyed in the wake of an impending disaster known as 'The End', they are forced to leave their home of shelter and security and wander into the wilderness of the unknown to find a new home.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull
programme.desc: Action-adventure reboot of the iconic movie franchise. During the Cold War, Soviet agents watch Indiana Jones receive a coded message from a colleague called Harold Oxley - led by the brilliant Irina Spalko, the Soviets tail Jones and 'Mutt' Williams, the young man who brought the message to Indiana, to Peru. Using Oxley's code, Indiana and Mutt find a legendary skull made of a single piece of quartz - if the explorer can deliver the skull to its rightful place, Harold might yet be saved...

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: Satirical comedy featuring a screenplay by noted US comedian and writer Tina Fey. Cady Heron is a 16-year-old home-schooled girl who not only makes the mistake of falling for Aaron Samuels - the ex-boyfriend of her public high school's social queen bee Regina George - but also unintentionally joins The Plastics, a trio of glamorous girls led by Regina herself. Cady is about to learn that high school life can and will be really tough for the socially naive...

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: The unthinkable happens in Essex this week, as a rift tears through Girl Band, and everyone's loyalty is called into question. After Amy tells Saff that Harry believes Elma is the one spreading gossip back to Essex, Saff wastes no time passing it on. Elma confronts Amy and finally learns the root of Harry's anger, but the revelations don't stop there. Unbeknownst to Elma and Courtney, Amber has told Harry they've been talking about him in their private WhatsApp group. When a shocked Elma finds out, a showdown becomes inevitable. Meanwhile, Amy confronts Harry and Wills for the first time since their return from Vietnam, and has some choice words for Wills. Can he talk her round? Elsewhere, some of the group have a more positive week, as Sophie hosts a girl's night, and later makes baby plans with Jordan, and Ella and Dani partake in some scream therapy.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in a wacky Rhode Island town. When Brian wishes that he could find some inspiration after being dismissed from a writing class at a community college, Stewie uses his time machine to introduce him to Luke the Evangelist, Charles Dickens, Ernest Hemingway and Mark Twain - Brian hits it off with Twain, but he accidentally gets him hooked on pornography when he invites him back to the present day and puts classic literature in jeopardy.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Animated comedy about the trials and tribulations of family life. Lois is named artistic director of the Quahog Players theatre group and chooses The King and I as her first production.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Subversive animated comedy about the everyday trials and tribulations of family life. At Chris's soccer game, Peter gets into a fight with a woman that he thought was a man, and punches her in the face. After being placed under house arrest, Peter becomes restless and ends up turning the basement into a full bar. Lois begins singing each night and becomes the main attraction. Meanwhile, Stewie creates a time machine in order to avoid teething pain.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Animated comedy series about CIA agent Stan Smith. Steve's book becomes a success, leading to fame. The entire family gets caught up in his celebrity, including Stan, who becomes an unbearable stage parent. After Steve hooks up with an agent, he abandons his family to lead a celebrity lifestyle.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Animated series about family man Stan Smith, who works for the CIA and is constantly on the alert for terrorist activity. Stan invites his boss over for dinner, but the Smith family fears getting caught hiding Roger.

programme.title: G'wed
programme.desc: Comedy series providing an honest, uplifting and heart-warming portrayal of the lives of working-class teenagers from Liverpool while tackling issues with a refreshing humour. programme.desc: Light-hearted drama series about a pair of gardening enthusiasts-turned-amateur sleuths. Wellminster Cathedral is preparing for a royal visit and its Custos has asked Rosemary and Laura to restore the old monastery physic garden to mark the cathedral's millennium, but someone is not happy about the girls working on the herb garden. When the Custos' daughter Trish is found murdered there, Rosemary and Laura realise that they could be in serious danger and suspect that Trish's boyfriend Ryan who knows more than he is telling - could the mystery surrounding the cathedral dean's recent hit-and-run accident be connected to current events, and what secrets are this tight-knit community concealing? As Rosemary and Laura struggle to bring the herb garden back to life in time for the royal visit, a shocking discovery is made...

programme.title: Rosemary & Thyme
programme.desc: Light-hearted drama series. Caroline Pargeter, the granddaughter of the famous botanist Edwin Pargeter, is selling her house and has asked Rosemary and Laura to reorganise a seed museum created by her late grandfather - when a mysterious South American is found dead in Caroline's back garden, it appears that there is more to Edwin's seeds than meets the eye. Rosemary consults a friend who works for the Royal Horticultural Society in Kew to help identify some pine seeds before they can fall into the wrong hands.

programme.title: Rosemary & Thyme
programme.desc: Light-hearted drama series about a pair of sleuthing gardeners. When Neil Spicer, a former boyfriend of Rosemary's, invites her and Laura to his home in the hills behind Malaga in southern Spain to help create an Arabic garden, one of the local residents is then found dead and their mysterious landowner Luis Mendes is the chief suspect. As Neil declares his continuing love for Rosemary - who must also contend with Neil's jealous wife - Laura discovers clues in the history of the local aquifers. Someone has been blocking the mountainside water channels on which the new garden will rely - is the precious water the real reason behind the murder?

programme.desc: Crime thriller featuring the author's much-loved spinster sleuth. programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Crime drama series. Are campaigners against the local airfield behind Bernard King's murder - or does it date back to a tragic story from the Second World War?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: 100th episode of the rural detective drama series. DCI John Barnaby and DS Charlie Nelson head off across the North Sea when the body of Midsomer resident Eric Calder is discovered in Copenhagen. The boss of Calder's Biscuit Factory has been murdered in the Danish capital, and Barnaby and Nelson join forces with two local female detectives - the abrasive but astute Birgitte Poulsen and the cool yet charming Anna Degn - in the hunt for the killer. In the course of the investigation they discover that Harry had more links to Copenhagen than just his famous golden clusters.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The unveiling of a newly-discovered novel by deceased Midsomer crime-writer George Summersbee at the Luxton Deeping Crime Festival is jeopardised when the manuscript is stolen and a woman is fatally electrocuted by a booby-trapped roulette wheel. Can new dad Barnaby untangle a web of jealousy and obsession to find the killer?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Crime drama series based on characters created by Ann Cleeves. DCI Vera Stanhope is on track to uncover an intriguing yet puzzling case when the body of a sickly young girl is found in a railway siding in the middle of nowhere - the girl could be anyone, but the investigation soon turns up twists and turns that makes Vera question who this girl actually was. As a vulnerable young person with a serious health condition, it appears as if her weakened state has allowed someone to take advantage of her and her family's dynamic changed when she wasn't truly part of the family. In a tale of intrigue, betrayal and blurred lines, Vera's investigation questions the meaning of family, care, accountability and eroding trust where care might have come at a cost.

Angry about how Boisie handles it, Joan storms out with cash - when she then struggles to sell her diamonds to a fence called King, Social Services' impending visit forces Joan to reconcile with Boisie. Boisie lets her in and a new level of trust forms between them - in order to secure cash for her life with Kelly, Joan then proposes a heist to steal a ring that involves Albie as her accomplice. Boisie's jealousy adds tension, but when they succeed and Joan sells the ring to King, Boisie makes a grand proposal during a dinner party that causes the celebrations to become even more raucous - a hungover Joan is then visited by a social worker who has bad news about Kelly.

As the police close in, Boisie struggles to find a buyer for the painting and turns to Albie for help - meanwhile, Joan is cleaning antiques at Boisie's shop and dreaming of running her own jewellery business while excelling in a gemmology course. programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Crime drama. Carson's Circus has rolled into town and Will, Geordie and the rest of the Grantchester family are making the trip to it - they delight in watching mind-bending illusions and death-defying stunts, but the very next morning dawns with Errol Macabre, one of the circus performers, being found dead having been shot with a crossbow that was used in a magic trick. Was this a tragic accident caused by a malfunctioning prop? When Geordie sees that the crossbow has been tampered with, he realises this was no such thing and that someone wanted Errol dead - with the circus closed and the rest of the performers having alibis for the time of the murder, who could have possibly done this?

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Crime drama. Will wants to grab a quiet moment with Geordie to tell him that he and Bonnie have decided to leave Grantchester, but any chance he might have had is thrown out the window when Geordie receives a call about a dead body at the River View Hotel - as the time for Sunday service approaches, Will and Bonnie enter the church but are stopped short on discovery of an abandoned baby inside. Upon inspecting the blanket the baby is wrapped in, Will and Bonnie see that it is marked River View Hotel and learn that a young woman had checked in there the night before and made a phone call to the halfway house - after Ernie reports that he witnessed a young girl wearing a school blazer enter the church that morning, Will and Geordie probe into the staff and pupils of the Fidelis School for Girls and secrets start to emerge that turn the entire investigation on its head. When Will later finds an inopportune moment to tell Geordie that he is leaving, his friend is stung by the news...

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: The final episode of the detective drama series. Lewis and Hathaway are called in to investigate when an idyllic Oxford summer's day is shattered by a parcel bomb - the victim of the attack is eminent mathematician Adam Capstone, a genius in the field of knot theory. Adam was notorious for his numerous affairs with attractive young students, so could his wife have the motive to want him dead?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby decides to join a trip from Midsomer Parva to Brighton because he is suspicious about a deal to buy coastal land for holiday chalets by Causton's mayor Dave Hicks - he discovers that the land wanted by Hicks is prone to flooding from the sea. Also against the proposal is Lady Matilda William, a descendant of a French knight Sir Richard Guillaume, whose son Richard will be the last of the line because of brain damage sustained in an attack 20 years ago - in Brighton, some of the villagers go to the funfair. When Dalgleish takes a ride on the ghost train, he emerges from the tunnel beheaded - Barnaby learns about a proposal to build flood defences which would make Hicks' land rocket in value and that Dalgleish lent Hicks money to bribe councillors to agree. Back in Midsomer, Barnaby realises there could be a connection between Dalgleish's greedy desire for land and Lady Matilda's desire to preserve the Guillaume family line... but who is prepared to kill to protect Richard?

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Donald confronts Carl when Anna tells him she thinks he was behind their client taking his business to the Kings. Nicola wears an over-the-top outfit to the book reading.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a 1960s Yorkshire village. Greengrass becomes the recipient of some stolen cigarettes, Jo receives some tragic news, and an ex-soldier brings wartime memories with him when he returns to Aidensfield.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a 1960s Yorkshire village. Nick discovers the complicated history behind a well-dressed woman and her romance with a member of the community, and Claude tries to help an Australian couple.

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Crime drama series based on characters created by Ann Cleeves. DCI Vera Stanhope investigates when the body of the co-owner of a chip shop is found in his own freezer - a seemingly successful entrepreneur and dedicated family man, Vera uncovers secrets, lies and some unforgivable behaviour as she tries to unwrap the case. Once the investigation begins, it soon becomes apparent that our enigmatic entrepreneur has left behind debts, broken promises, ruined lives and seriously interfered in family business that was not his own - now Vera must find who is responsible for the this unsavoury chip shop assault and battery.

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Crime drama. Geordie is still mourning Will's departure when Mrs C charges into the pub with reports of a gentleman breaking into the vicarage - Geordie leaps into action and heads straight inside the vicarage to confront the intruder. A tussle ensues between them before Geordie is confronted by the realisation that this man is no burglar - he's the new vicar. The man introduces himself as the Reverend Alphy Kottaram - as Alphy settles into life in Grantchester, his first order of business at the church is a funeral service for local landowner Albert Baron, who apparently took his own life - when the service is abruptly interrupted by the Walkers, a family warring with the Barons, a fight breaks out in the church. As the Walkers leave, Albert's son Harvey accuses the Walkers of murdering his father - as Alphy corrals the two families into the vicarage and Geordie arrives to investigate, an initially reluctant Alphy finds himself drawn into solving clues and uncovering buried secrets.

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Crime drama. Alphy receives a mysterious letter in the post - this is the second time he's received post of its kind, but the meaning behind both letters entirely escapes him. Alphy doesn't have long to dwell on this because he has been invited to Marwood Manor for dinner and a party - Alphy plans to use this opportunity to drum up funds for the ailing church, but when Lady Marwood announces that it's time to play hide and seek, Alphy finds himself opening a cupboard while looking for a suitable hiding spot and is surprised to discover a dead body inside. The body is that of Dennis, the Marwoods' gardener who had apparently left the manor only a day before without a word - a blackmail letter is found on him, but it's not immediately clear whether the letter is addressed to Dennis or if he'd written it for someone else. As Alphy and Geordie investigate the murky world of the manor, they begin to uncover strange secrets and illicit desires amongst the residents and staff there.

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Drama series following two detective constables in Manchester and written by BAFTA Award-winner Sally Wainwright. When DC Rachel Bailey is dumped, her best friend DC Janet Scott is there to pick up the pieces. Meanwhile, DCI Gill Murray takes Rachel, Janet and the team through their new murder case at work: a young Turkish woman has been killed in her home and her death made to look like suicide. Rachel throws herself into the investigation, soon discovering that the victim's husband was having an affair - she takes a risk when she questions the man's mistress, but has her high-stakes approach jeopardised the case, or will she get results? Rachel is also occupied with investigating her ex and is horrified to find that he is married with children - at the same time, Janet is contacted by the brother of a school friend who was abducted and murdered when they were still at primary school. He asks if she will reopen the case - and Janet agrees to take another look at the evidence.

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Police drama following the personal and professional lives of two Manchester detectives. Things become even more complicated for Rachel when she reveals to her ex Nick that she is pregnant - and his unsympathetic response confirms her decision to have a termination. At work, the team face a gruesome case in which a mother of two has been brutally raped and left to bleed to death in the boot of her car. The team get a lucky break when CCTV footage reveals a man following the woman just before she disappeared - the same man who had been seen asking for a taxi to the Walden Estate. The police go to the estate to make house-to-house enquiries, and a sharp piece of detective work from Rachel leads to the arrest of teenager Luke Farrell. However, Luke's arrest sparks a series of events which leads to further tragedy, much to the horror of the team. Meanwhile, Janet steps up her investigation into her childhood friend Veronica's death and meets with an officer who investigated the murder.
